productDisplayName: Van Heusen Women Casual Gold Frame Sunglasses
description: High on style, this pair of distortion free sunglasses from the van heusen collection comes in a styled frame. An eclectic mixture of fashion and substance, its shape provides that perfect Fit over the root of your nose. The glasses come with a sturdy case Tinted lens which provide 100% protection against harmful UV rays in normal daylight Metallic frame with an woven design for absolute comfort and durability Oval lens for absolute style and protection from elements Flexible hinges for durability Flexible nose pads made of rubber with a double nose bridge on the frame to hold the glasses in place, ensuring there is no friction with the skin Care Remove dust and grime by gently wiping the lens with a non abrasive cloth Remove oil or tough stains with the help of a lens cleaner Do not use your fingers on such stains Do not place glasses on uneven surface or heated areas like the dashboard of a car
